identity.headline: {{businessName}} helps {{clientDescription}} get measurable results without burnout.
identity.corePromise: Move from inconsistency to predictable growth with a clear weekly execution system.

bookingTypes.title: Clarity Call
bookingTypes.description: A focused call to diagnose bottlenecks and map your next best moves.

bookingTypes.title: Momentum Intensive
bookingTypes.description: A paid deep-dive session to build your 90-day client growth roadmap.

fields.label: Your #1 goal in the next 90 days

emailTemplates.name: Lead Welcome
emailTemplates.subject: Welcome to {{businessName}} — here’s your next step

emailTemplates.name: Strategy Call Follow-up
emailTemplates.subject: Your action plan from today
emailTemplates.bodyText:
Hi {{contactSingular}},

Excellent conversation today. Your highest-leverage focus is:
1) Clarify your offer promise
2) Improve your conversion sequence
3) Tighten weekly execution cadence

If you want support implementing this with accountability, reply with 'READY' and I’ll send next steps.

— {{businessName}}

emailTemplates.name: Proposal Reminder
emailTemplates.subject: Quick check-in on your proposal
emailTemplates.bodyText:
Hey {{contactSingular}},

Quick nudge in case this slipped down your inbox.

If now is the right time, I can onboard you this week and we’ll start with a focused 30-day sprint.

Want me to hold your spot?

— {{businessName}}

sections.heading: Desired Outcome
sections.body: Help {{contactSingular}} achieve {{primaryOutcome}} within 90 days through weekly implementation support.

sections.heading: Scope
sections.body: Weekly coaching sessions, asynchronous support, offer and messaging refinement, funnel feedback, and KPI tracking.

sections.heading: Guarantee
sections.body: If you complete agreed action items for 30 days and see no measurable momentum, we extend support at no extra cost.

content.headline: Turn your expertise into consistent premium clients
content.subheadline: {{businessName}} helps {{clientDescription}} build a repeatable client acquisition system without content burnout.

content.headline: What changes in the first 30 days

benefits.title: Offer Clarity
benefits.description: Position your offer so ideal clients immediately understand the value.

benefits.title: Simple Systems
benefits.description: Run your weekly pipeline with clear next steps and fewer dropped leads.

benefits.title: Conversion Lift
benefits.description: Improve your call-to-close process with a practical enrollment framework.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.description: Audit your current offer, pipeline, and conversion points.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Build your 90-day strategy and weekly execution scoreboard.

steps.title: Execute
steps.description: Implement with accountability until results are measurable.

testimonials.quote: In six weeks, we doubled qualified calls and finally had a predictable sales rhythm.
testimonials.author: Amira K.

testimonials.quote: The pipeline system alone paid for itself in month one.
testimonials.author: Jason R.

faqs.question: Is this for beginners?
faqs.answer: This is best for experts with an offer who want stronger consistency and conversion.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see progress?
faqs.answer: Most clients see clearer positioning and better pipeline control in the first 2-4 weeks.

faqs.question: Do you provide copy and scripts?
faqs.answer: Yes. You get practical scripts and messaging frameworks customized to your offer.

content.headline: Ready to simplify growth?
content.body: Book a call and leave with an actionable plan, whether we work together or not.
